commit_scope: Make the sovereignty receipt MEASURED, not estimated, and turn the measured numbers into a ranked attention signal. Adds attention-signal.fk (four-way 255) that tiers per-lane native readiness by gap x volume, and scripts/sovereignty_report.sh — a thin carrier reading two live feeds (the session transcript for real token payload; form-cli stats for real held-out native scores). The measured run proved the point: a hand estimate of 'tens of K out' measured at ~2.05M out this session.
evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/attention-signal.fk form-stdlib/tests/attention-signal-band.fk -> '✓ ... → 255' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample.'
Manifest row added: 'attention-signal fks 255' beside its kin sovereignty-receipt.

The band pins the ranking on REAL measured form-cli stats (2026-06-21): a high-volume weak lane (Read 64%, vol 612) ranks tier-2 ATTEND; a high-volume near-native lane (Bash 97%, vol 907) ranks tier-1 last-mile; StructuredOutput (99%) last-mile; a low-volume lane rests at tier-0; at-prefer picks the lane that most needs attention. Verdict 255.

Carrier proven live: bash scripts/sovereignty_report.sh produced a real receipt — payload measured from the session transcript at ~174866 in / ~2049540 out tokens (vs a prior hand-estimate of 'tens of K out' — measurement corrected the estimate by ~100x), and native readiness from form-cli stats (catalog 497, local-suffice 42%, held-out micro-accuracy 84.8% vs 79.9% baseline, per-lane Bash 97% / Read 64% / Edit 67% / Write 68%).

Carrier discipline: scripts/sovereignty_report.sh only GATHERS measured numbers from two live feeds (transcript + form-cli stats) and presents them; the ranking logic is the Form recipe attention-signal.fk (four-way) and the honesty logic is sovereignty-receipt.fk. No new logic-Python.

Edges in the same commit: scripts/INDEX.md + MANIFEST.md regenerated (--check clean); sovereignty-receipt.form extended with a (measured ...) feed section and an (attention ...) section naming the current ATTEND lanes.
Primitive discipline held: attention-signal.fk uses only core.fk primitives (nth, eq, ge, if); no sub/mul/div, no 3-arg and.

fourth_arm_outputs: attention-signal: verdict 255, fourth arm 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree

ci_validation.notes: CI re-runs validate.sh across the suite for the new recipe + band + manifest row, and INDEX --check.

deploy_validation.notes: A Form stdlib recipe + proof band + a report carrier + teaching; no public HTTP endpoint or service change. Next: emit the receipt into the runtime per-response rather than on demand, and add the per-lane attention ranking to form-cli stats directly.

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way validation passed (verdict 255, 0 divergent) and the carrier ran live with measured numbers; CI and merge remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The sovereignty receipt is now measured from live feeds rather than hand-supplied, and attention-signal.fk ranks the measured per-lane gap so attention lands where closing it matters most. Running scripts/sovereignty_report.sh prints real token payload + real native readiness + the current ATTEND lanes.
public_endpoints: none changed; the gate is a Form stdlib body proven by validate.sh; the carrier reads local feeds
test_flows: Four-kernel proof: the attention-signal band runs on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu to the identical verdict 255 with 0 divergent.
Live carrier: scripts/sovereignty_report.sh emits measured token payload and form-cli held-out scores, and names the ATTEND lanes.
